name: sums_diffs
fallback_directions: Refine near the current best: small perturbations of the best known set or its generating parameters. Exploitation, not exploration.
Try known MSTD (more-sums-than-differences) base sets and asymmetric variants.
Structured constructions: unions of arithmetic progressions / intervals with carefully chosen gaps.
Base expansion / product constructions with mixed base sets at different digit positions.
Randomized local search: add/remove/shift elements, keep changes that raise C(A).
Scale up: larger sets within the element-range limit, checking the solver stays in budget.
Combine the best ideas seen so far in the experience bank.
